name: @continuum/sif-comparative
description: SIF-Bench B0-B3 comparative harness: deterministic, shared-input evaluation of an unrestricted agent (B0), top-k RAG (B1), strong RBAC RAG (B2), and Continuum I1-I7 (B3) on a joint (Utility, Disclosure, SecurityViolations, Latency, Cost) frontier. No live model.
author: Frank Asante Van Laarhoven <frankleroyvan@gmail.com>
